title: Medieval Embroidery
body:
**Medieval Embroidery**

Medieval Embroidery is a large, medieval-themed high fantasy mod that includes decor, mythical creatures, food, equipment, and building blocks.

Find gemstones to make the brand new weapons and armor, crystals to make crystal balls, and craft all sorts of new medieval-themed decorations for your next castle or cottage!

Find herbs, berries, fruits and mushrooms in the wild to grow and craft a feast fit for a king.

Animals include **Fairies, Fanged Elk, and Direwolves**.


**Other QoL features include:**

-Right-Click harvesting crops

-Special "Pixel Placement" Decor that allows for precise placement on blocks

-Walk and Sprint toggles on mounts



(Requires **Geckolib and Patchouli** as dependencies)

**Discord:** https://discord.gg/2WznNTtVac


JEI (Just Enough Items) suggested for recipes.

[![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/oxzCr5w.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=1122)
